citation_short: UN Truth Commission for El Salvador, 1993
title: From Madness to Hope: The 12-Year War in El Salvador - Report of the Commission on the Truth for El Salvador
author_or_org: Commission on the Truth for El Salvador
geographic_scope: El Salvador, with specific discussion of the 1989 final offensive and San Salvador
strengths: Best recovered primary-style narrative for the start date, capital focus, urban-civilian danger, and broad casualty context.
limitations: Most numeric death totals reported are whole-offensive and not city-exclusive.
notes: Core narrative anchor for the San Salvador bundle.

citation_short: CJA facts page on Jesuits massacre case
title: Facts of the Case
pages_or_sections: section I. The FMLN Offensive November 11, 1989
geographic_scope: San Salvador and surrounding capital sectors
strengths: Concise identification of the capital-centered theater and the named state formations involved.
notes: Used to keep the bundle city-bounded and to identify the state forces that need denominator recovery.

title: The FMLN After the November 1989 Offensive
strengths: Provides a specific sourceable insurgent-strength range tied to the launch of the capital offensive.
limitations: Recovered here only from the public search-result snippet because direct PDF fetching looped.
notes: Used for the 2,000-2,300 insurgent denominator range.
